ksa_text: Knowledge of data lineage concepts and documentation methods, including end-to-end lineage from source to consumption, transformation-level lineage, lineage visualization, and impact analysis use cases for data change management.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data analysis tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-012 (DQ, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4019 is insufficient to establish relevance to self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.402, ddat=0.402, nist_ai_rmf=0.402) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: DQ domain KSA DQ-K-012 excluded at composite 0.4019, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4019 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4019 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a DQ (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Citizen Data Scientist. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. DQ KSA with composite 0.4019 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DQ-K-012 (DQ, composite 0.4019) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4019 with signal across nice=0.402, ddat=0.402, nist_ai_rmf=0.402 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DQ-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4019, domain DQ. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
